name: Improper Validation of Certificate with Host Mismatch
description: The product communicates with a host that provides a certificate but does not verify that the certificate is actually associated with that host. An attacker with a valid certificate for a different domain can impersonate the intended host via man-in-the-middle attacks.
detection_pattern: Look for EXTERNAL nodes (TLS connection, certificate presentation) that establish trust with AUTH nodes (connection authentication, identity acceptance) without a CONTROL mediator (hostname verification, CN/SAN matching, certificate-to-host binding check) that confirms the certificate's subject matches the intended communication endpoint.
